user_feedback: I dont want to have my car icon flashing when I hit the triangle boost, can you add another different indicator proving that I am invincible? perhaps a different outline animation indicating that?
analysis:
- Issue identified: When the player hits a ramp boost (triangle), they become invincible and the car icon flashes. The user wants to remove this flashing and add a different visual indicator for invincibility during ramp boost.
- Files affected: entities.js (PlayerCar render method)
- Changes needed: 
  1. Modify the flashing logic to only apply when invulnerable from damage (not from ramp boost)
  2. Add an animated outline effect (pulsing cyan/blue border) when invincible from ramp boost
  3. This distinguishes damage invulnerability (flashing) from ramp boost invulnerability (animated outline)
